column1: # Inventory of intentionally adversarial content in this repo.
# Every file that contains by-design injection/hidden-text payloads MUST be
# listed here with its sha256. The verifier (evals/verify_adversarial.py) scans
# the repo for adversarial content and fails if any is found that is NOT
# declared here. This makes self-generated nefarious test data identifiable and
# accountable, so it can never be confused with an external plant.

column3: Synthetic poisoned resume: golden-set adversarial candidate (3 injection vectors). Authored as a test fixture.
